safety_note: MOCK fixture for an open-source multi-agent example. This is not real patient data and must not be used for diagnosis or treatment.

timeline.event: Noticed unusual fatigue after ordinary exercise.
Reports more frequent difficulty climbing stairs.
Found online posts linking similar symptoms to a named rare muscle disease.

patient_current_belief: A web article made the patient wonder whether this is MYO-X related rare muscle disease.
